selections.name: Copernium
selections.reason: Paco Lopez takes the mount on this class dropper with a 108 Class rating. Showed excellent early speed in last start at Gulfstream Park.

selections.name: Johnny Come Lately
selections.reason: Boasts a field-best 108 Speed figure. Drops in class and cuts back in distance, making him a prime pace threat.

selections.name: My Man Money
selections.reason: Consistent runner with a 96 Speed figure. Should get a favorable stalking trip behind the top two speed horses.

selections.name: Essentially Fast
selections.reason: Solid 95 Speed figure and drops into a winnable spot. Can pick up the pieces if the pace melts down.

danger_horse.name: Sociably Johnny
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw and a 97 Speed figure make him a threat to wire the field if uncontested.

selections.name: Black Label
selections.reason: First-time starter for the potent Jorge Delgado barn (38% win rate). Gets Paco Lopez in the irons, a massive positive angle.

selections.name: City Streaker
selections.reason: Debuting for Eddie Owens Jr. Shows solid morning workouts indicating readiness for this short sprint.

selections.name: Sea Devil
selections.reason: Rail draw for a debut runner can be tricky, but Luis Rivera Jr. is capable of hustling this one out of the gate.

selections.name: Hurricane Mo
selections.reason: Sonny Leon takes the mount for Jose Delgado. Workouts suggest some early foot.

danger_horse.name: Justintimeformusic
danger_horse.reason: Charlie Marquez rides for Jose Delgado; could surprise at a price if the favorites miss the break.

selections.name: Chelsea Wall
selections.reason: Jamie Ness and Paco Lopez team up. Boasts a 97 Class rating and has been facing tougher company at Parx.

selections.name: Equus
selections.reason: Consistent mare with a 98 Speed figure. Jomar Torres should have her sitting in the garden spot just off the pace.

selections.name: La Vecchia Signora
selections.reason: Owns a 99 Speed figure and drops slightly in class. Outside draw keeps her out of trouble.

selections.name: Rogue Justice
selections.reason: Comes off a solid effort at Penn National. 99 Class rating indicates she belongs with these.

danger_horse.name: Salagadoola
danger_horse.reason: Has back class and a 96 Form rating. Could hit the board at a price.

selections.name: Bashful Baby
selections.reason: Richard Dutrow hits at 50% and puts Paco Lopez up. 107 Speed figure and 104 Class rating tower over this field.

selections.name: Derby Hangover
selections.reason: 104 Speed figure and drops into maiden claiming company. Sonny Leon should have her flying late.

selections.name: April Spun
selections.reason: Kathleen O'Connell trainee with a 98 Speed figure. Pedro Cotto Jr. can get her into the exotics.

selections.name: Chestertown Jane
selections.reason: Outside post is tough, but she has a 92 Speed figure and drops from Maiden Special Weight company.

danger_horse.name: Ship Of Fools
danger_horse.reason: Drops from Maiden Special Weight at Delaware Park. Could wake up against easier.

selections.name: Amberjack
selections.reason: Massive 115 Class rating and 108 Speed figure. Paco Lopez rides for Jorge Delgado. Looks like a standout.

selections.name: Frostelle
selections.reason: 105 Speed figure and 105 Class rating. Outside draw is perfect for her stalking style.

selections.name: My Military Hero
selections.reason: Has experience and a 105 Class rating. Rail draw means he must be sent early.

selections.name: Point Barrow
selections.reason: 96 Speed figure and drops from tougher maiden races at Parx. Can hit the ticket.

danger_horse.name: U Dirty Dog
danger_horse.reason: 96 Class rating and drops in class. Could be a factor if the pace is hot.

selections.name: I'm Due
selections.reason: Paco Lopez rides this class dropper with a field-best 111 Speed figure. Rail draw is ideal for his running style.

selections.name: Solo Empire
selections.reason: 99 Speed figure and drops from allowance company. Jose Gomez should have him well-placed.

selections.name: Prince Of Troy
selections.reason: 109 Speed figure and drops in class. Ramon Moya can get him involved late.

selections.name: That Sun Of A Gun
selections.reason: 107 Speed figure. Sonny Leon rides and should get a ground-saving trip.

danger_horse.name: Son Of A Slew
danger_horse.reason: 105 Speed figure and drops in class. Outside post is a negative, but has the talent to overcome it.

selections.name: Cairo Surprise
selections.reason: Paco Lopez rides for Cathal Lynch. 113 Class rating and 107 Speed figure. Looks primed for a massive effort in this stakes race.

selections.name: Speaking
selections.reason: 107 Speed and Class ratings. Luis Rivera Jr. will have him rolling late if the pace is hot.

selections.name: Boardwalk Jack
selections.reason: 109 Class rating and Jorge Vargas Jr. rides. Outside draw is favorable for a stalking trip.

selections.name: Great Navigator
selections.reason: 107 Class rating and Jose Gomez rides. Consistent stakes performer who always fires.

danger_horse.name: Forever Chocolate
danger_horse.reason: 110 Class rating. Rail draw is tough, but has the back class to surprise at a price.

selections.name: Woodruff
selections.reason: Paco Lopez takes the mount on this class dropper. 100 Class rating and should relish the class relief.

selections.name: Backseat Romance
selections.reason: 100 Speed figure and Jose Gomez rides. Outside draw is tricky, but has the tactical speed to overcome it.

selections.name: Radar Loop
selections.reason: 97 Speed figure and Sonny Leon rides. Inside draw ensures a ground-saving trip.

selections.name: More Vino Rosa
selections.reason: Chantal Sutherland rides. 94 Speed figure and consistent form makes her a logical exotics player.

danger_horse.name: Richie's Valentine
danger_horse.reason: 99 Speed figure and drops in class. Could wake up at a price.
